data.name: Age and Sex
data.text:
Male or female participants age ≥18 years.
A female participant is eligible to participate if she is not pregnant or breastfeeding. Refer to Appendix 4 for all reproductive criteria for male (Section 10.4.1) and female (Section 10.4.2) participants.

data.name: Compliance with study procedures
data.text: Participants who are willing and able to comply with all scheduled visits, treatment plan, laboratory tests, lifestyle considerations, and other study procedures.

data.name: Prior diagnosis of MM
data.text: Prior diagnosis of MM as defined according to IMWG criteria (Rajkumar et al, 2014).

data.name: Measurable disease
data.text:
Measurable disease based on IMWG criteria as defined by at least 1 of the following:
a. Serum M_protein >0.5 g/dL by SPEP
b. Urinary M_protein excretion >200 mg/24 hours by UPEP
c. Serum immunoglobulin FLC ≥10 mg/dL (≥100 mg/L) AND abnormal serum immunoglobulin kappa to lambda FLC ratio (<0.26 or >1.65)

data.name: Refractory to IMiD
data.text:
Refractory to at least one IMiD (as defined in Note below).
Note: Refractory is defined as having disease progression while on therapy or within 60 days of last dose in any line, regardless of response.

data.name: Refractory to anti_CD38 antibody
data.text:
Refractory to at least one anti_CD38 antibody (as defined in Note below).
Note: Refractory is defined as having disease progression while on therapy or within 60 days of last dose in any line, regardless of response.

data.name: Relapsed or refractory to last anti_MM regimen
data.text:
Relapsed or refractory to last anti_MM regimen.
Note: Refractory is defined as having disease progression while on therapy or within 60 days of last dose in any line, regardless of response.

data.name: Prior BCMA_directed therapy status
data.text:
Cohort A: Has not received prior BCMA_directed therapy.
Cohort B: Has received prior BCMA_directed ADC or BCMA_directed CAR T_cell therapy, either approved or investigational.

data.name: ECOG performance status
data.text: ECOG performance status ≤2.

data.name: LVEF
data.text: LVEF ≥40% as determined by a MUGA scan or ECHO.

data.name: Adequate hepatic function
data.text:
Adequate hepatic function characterized by the following:
a. Total bilirubin ≤2 x ULN (≤3 x ULN if documented Gilbert’s syndrome);
b. AST ≤2.5 x ULN; and
c. ALT ≤2.5 x ULN

data.name: Adequate renal function
data.text: Adequate renal function defined by an estimated creatinine clearance ≥30 mL/min (according to the Cockcroft Gault formula, by 24_hour urine collection for creatinine clearance, or according to local institutional standard method).

data.name: Adequate BM function
data.text:
Adequate BM function characterized by the following:
a. ANC ≥1.0 × 109/L (use of granulocyte_colony stimulating factors is permitted if completed at least 7 days prior to planned start of dosing);
b. Platelets ≥25 × 109/L (transfusion support is permitted if completed at least 7 days prior to planned start of dosing); and
c. Hemoglobin ≥8 g/dL (transfusion support is permitted if completed at least 7 days prior to planned start of dosing).

data.name: Resolved acute effects of prior therapy
data.text: Resolved acute effects of any prior therapy to baseline severity or CTCAE Grade ≤1.

data.name: Informed Consent
data.text: Capable of giving signed informed consent as described in Appendix 1, which includes compliance with the requirements and restrictions listed in the ICD and in this protocol.

data.text: Smoldering MM.

data.text: Stem cell transplant within 12 weeks prior to enrollment or active GVHD.

Ongoing peripheral sensory or motor neuropathy
data.text: Ongoing Grade ≥2 peripheral sensory or motor neuropathy.

data.name: History of peripheral sensory or motor neuropathy with prior BCMA_directed therapy
data.text: History of any grade peripheral sensory or motor neuropathy with prior BCMA_directed therapy (Cohort B).

data.name: History of GBS or GBS variants or Grade ≥3 peripheral motor polyneuropathy
data.text: History of GBS or GBS variants, or history of any Grade ≥3 peripheral motor polyneuropathy.

data.name: Active infections
data.text: Active HBV, HCV, SARS_CoV2, HIV, or any active, uncontrolled bacterial, fungal, or viral infection. Active infections must be resolved at least 14 days prior to enrollment.

data.name: Other active malignancy
data.text: Any other active malignancy within 3 years prior to enrollment, except for adequately treated basal cell or squamous cell skin cancer, or carcinoma in situ.

data.name: Other medical or psychiatric conditions
data.text: Other surgical (including major surgery within 14 days prior to enrollment), medical or psychiatric conditions including recent (within the past year) or active suicidal ideation/behavior or laboratory abnormality that may increase the risk of study participation or, in the investigator’s judgment, make the participant inappropriate for the study.

data.name: Previous treatment with anti_BCMA bispecific antibody
data.text: Previous treatment with an anti_BCMA bispecific antibody.

data.name: Previous administration with investigational drug
data.text: Previous administration with an investigational drug within 30 days (or as determined by the local requirement) or 5 half_lives preceding the first dose of study intervention used in this study (whichever is longer).

data.name: Investigator site staff or Pfizer employees
data.text: Investigator site staff or Pfizer employees directly involved in the conduct of the study, site staff otherwise supervised by the investigator, and their respective family members.

data.name: Known or suspected hypersensitivity
data.text: Known or suspected hypersensitivity to the study intervention or any of its excipients.

data.name: Live attenuated vaccine
data.text: Live attenuated vaccine must not be administered within 4 weeks of the first dose of study intervention.

data.name: Amendment
data.summary: This amendment introduced the study name and generic name, clarified vital sign monitoring and CRS premedication, updated sample collection procedures and bone marrow function criteria, permitted COVID_19 vaccines, clarified dosing holds for CRS/ICANS, added interim analysis and PRO analysis sets, and revised temporary enrollment hold criteria due to regulatory changes.

The protocol states 'serum test required at screening', indicating a one_time assessment at the beginning of the study.

The protocol mentions 'Added sBCMA samples beyond Cycle 7 to characterize the impact of Q2W switch on sBCMA levels from Cycle 7 and on', which implies scheduled, repeated collections at discrete time points (e.g., at each subsequent cycle visit) for an extended period.

The protocol clarifies 'for predose samples, collection should occur prior to administration of PF_06863135 on that day'. Since drug administration is a scheduled, repeated event (e.g., at each treatment cycle), the associated predose sample collection is also recurring.

data.text: STUDY ASSESSMENTS AND PROCEDURES The investigator (or an appropriate delegate at the investigator site) must obtain a signed and dated ICD before performing any study_specific procedures. Study procedures and their timing are summarized in the SoA. Protocol waivers or exemptions are not allowed. Safety issues should be discussed with the sponsor immediately upon occurrence or awareness to determine whether the participant should continue or discontinue study intervention. Adherence to the study design requirements, including those specified in the SoA, is essential and required for study conduct. All screening evaluations must be completed and reviewed to confirm that potential participants meet all eligibility criteria. The investigator will maintain a screening log to CCI
